## Checklist

- [ ] `hadolint` passes if I touched the Dockerfile
- [ ] I tested locally with `docker compose up --build` (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or API keys are committed
- [ ] README / .env.example updated if I added an env var
